series_metadata.series_description: Training/Counceling forms for volunteers entered and submitted on a quarterly basis through the National Performance Reporting (NPR) system. Part of SHIP grant files.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until uploaded to www.shipnrp.acl.gov; then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain until uploaded to www.shipnrp.acl.gov; then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
